emails.subject: Re: Monthly Report
emails.body: Re: Monthly Report Should I have received a copy already? I don't remember seeing it. Sent by: Kay Young

emails.subject: Re: Monthly Report
emails.body: Re: Monthly Report Should I have received a copy already? I don't remember seeing it. Sent by: Kay Young

emails.subject: Monthly Report
emails.body: Mark I don't think you got this last week. My apologies, I know Net Works does its own report, but you need to get this to review the Financial Trading portion. Could you take a look at it today by any chance? Reminder It is time to update the Monthly Report for Mark Haedicke to send to Jim Derrick. Please use a hard copy of the attached February report to mark changes for transactions as of today. Remember to add outside counsel (the firm name) where appropriate. Give your hard copy changes to Dina Snow by the end of the day Tuesday, March 13. Thanks! Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com
